pokemon:arcanine.name: Arcanine
pokemon:arcanine.summary: Arcanine is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this Pokémon’s body is its source of power.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Arcanine is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this Pokémon’s body is its source of power.
Its proud and regal appearance has captured the hearts of people since long ago.
The sight of it running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night has captivated many people.
A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
An ancient picture scroll shows that people were attracted to its movement as it ran through prairies.
Its proud and regal appearance has captured the hearts of people since long ago.
This fleet-footed POKéMON is said to run over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within its body is its source of power.
A POKéMON that is described in Chinese legends. It is said to race at an unbelievable speed.
This legendary Chinese POKEMON is considered magnif­ icent. Many people are enchanted by its grand mane.
This legendary Chinese Pokémon is considered magnificent. Many people are enchanted by its grand mane.
A POKéMON that has long been admired for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
Snaps at its foes with fangs cloaked in blazing flame. Despite its bulk, it deftly feints every which way, leading opponents on a deceptively merry chase as it all but dances around them.
A legendary Pokémon in the East. Many people are charmed by the grace and beauty of its running.
A legendary Pokémon in the East. Many people are charmed by the grace and beauty of its running.
The fire burning inside its body serves as the energy to fuel it as it runs great distances. It appears in many legends.
Arcanine is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this Pokémon’s body is its source of power.
Its proud and regal appearance has captured the hearts of people since long ago.
Its proud and regal appearance has captured the hearts of people since long ago.
A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
ARCANINE is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this POKéMON’s body is its source of power.
ARCANINE is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this POKéMON’s body is its source of power.
A Pokémon that has long been admired for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
Its magnificent bark conveys a sense of majesty. Anyone hearing it can't help but grovel before it.
Its magnificent bark conveys a sense of majesty. Anyone hearing it can’t help but grovel before it.
Overflowing with beauty and majesty, this strong Pokémon appears in ancient Eastern folklore.
The sight of it running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night has captivated many people.
There are so many old tales about them that they’re called legendary Pokémon, but there are way more of them around than you’d expect.
Legends tell of its fighting alongside a general and conquering a whole country.
Its proud and regal appearance has captured the hearts of people since long ago.
The sight of it running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night has captivated many people.
A Pokémon that has long been admired for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
Its magnificent bark conveys a sense of majesty. Anyone hearing it can’t help but grovel before it.
A legendary POKé­ MON in China. Many people are charmed by its grace and beauty while running.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Arcanine is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this Pokémon’s body is its source of power.

pokemon:growlithe.name: Growlithe
pokemon:growlithe.summary: Growlithe has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this Pokémon won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Growlithe has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this Pokémon won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.
A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.
Extremely loyal to its Trainer, it will bark at those who approach the Trainer unexpectedly and run them out of town.
Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
It controls a big territory. If it detects an unknown smell, it roars loudly to force out the intruder.
A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.
Its superb sense of smell ensures that this POKéMON won’t forget any scent, no matter what. It uses its sense of smell to detect the emotions of others.
Very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.
It has a brave and trustworthy na­ ture. It fear­ lessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.
It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.
It is very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
They patrol their territory in pairs. I believe the igneous rock components in the fur of this species are the result of volcanic activity in its habitat.
A Pokémon with a friendly nature. However, it will bark fiercely at anything invading its territory.
A Pokémon with a friendly nature. However, it will bark fiercely at anything invading its territory.
It looks cute, but when you approach another Trainer’s Growlithe, it will bark at you and bite.

Growlithe has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this Pokémon won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.
A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.
A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.
Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

GROWLITHE has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this POKéMON won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.

GROWLITHE has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this POKéMON won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.
Extremely loyal, it will fearlessly bark at any opponent to protect its own Trainer from harm.
Extremely loyal, it will fearlessly bark at any oppo­ nent to protect its own trainer from harm.
Extremely loyal, it will fearlessly bark at any opponent to protect its own Trainer from harm.
It’s both clever and loyal, but if a stranger tries to invade its territory, it barks threateningly.
It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.
It has lived alongside humans since ages ago. Its bones have been found in excavations of ruins from the Stone Age.
While it’s quite friendly toward humans once it’s grown used to them, in the wild it must be quite fierce to defend its territory from Rockruff.
A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.
Extremely loyal to its Trainer, it will bark at those who approach the Trainer unexpectedly and run them out of town.
Very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.
It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.
A POKéMON with a friendly nature. However, it will bark fiercely at anything invading its territory.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Growlithe has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this Pokémon won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.
